---
number-sections: false
---

# Practice 16: Scaling, Deployment, and Responsible Use {#ch-practice-16 .unnumbered}

**Theory connection:** [Volume I, Chapter 16](../chapters/16-scaling.qmd)

Use this chapter as the practical companion to the corresponding theory chapter.
Recovered activities are linked where a strong match exists; other sections are
explicit development scaffolds for the next writing cycle.

## Time, Space, Data, and Compute {#sec-pr-16-time-space-data-and-compute}

Recovered starting point: [Data Mining Project](labs/data-mining-project.qmd#sec-lab-data-mining-project).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Batch, Streaming, and Distributed Workflows {#sec-pr-16-batch-streaming-and-distributed-workflows}

Recovered starting point: [Data Mining Project](labs/data-mining-project.qmd#sec-lab-data-mining-project).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## From Experiment to Reproducible Pipeline {#sec-pr-16-from-experiment-to-reproducible-pipeline}

Recovered starting point: [Data Mining Project](labs/data-mining-project.qmd#sec-lab-data-mining-project).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Deployment, Monitoring, and Drift {#sec-pr-16-deployment-monitoring-and-drift}

Recovered starting point: [Data Mining Project](labs/data-mining-project.qmd#sec-lab-data-mining-project).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Privacy, Security, and Misuse {#sec-pr-16-privacy-security-and-misuse}

Recovered starting point: [Data Mining Project](labs/data-mining-project.qmd#sec-lab-data-mining-project) and [Reinforcement Learning Extension](labs/reinforcement-learning-extension.qmd#sec-lab-reinforcement-learning-extension).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Energy, Sustainability, and Proportionality {#sec-pr-16-energy-sustainability-and-proportionality}

Recovered starting point: [Data Mining Project](labs/data-mining-project.qmd#sec-lab-data-mining-project) and [Reinforcement Learning Extension](labs/reinforcement-learning-extension.qmd#sec-lab-reinforcement-learning-extension).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Responsible Decisions and Human Oversight {#sec-pr-16-responsible-decisions-and-human-oversight}

Recovered starting point: [Data Mining Project](labs/data-mining-project.qmd#sec-lab-data-mining-project) and [Reinforcement Learning Extension](labs/reinforcement-learning-extension.qmd#sec-lab-reinforcement-learning-extension).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.
